d.t: Sân bay: Kiểm tra an ninh

e.p: Did you lock your bag before the flight?
e.m: Nói đã khóa túi chưa; nói bạn dùng gì để khóa; nói khi nào bạn khóa (ngày/giờ hoặc trước khi đi).
e.h: Past Simple + thời gian; dùng 'with' để nói công cụ.
e.s: I locked my bag before I left for the airport. I locked it with a small padlock. I did it two hours before the flight.

e.p: Do you remember where you put your passport?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn để passport; nói bạn đã kiểm tra nó chưa (Past Simple); nói bạn sẽ làm gì tiếp theo (will/going to).
e.h: Past Simple + will/going to + V.
e.s: I put my passport in my front pocket. I checked it at home before I left. I will keep it in my carry-on from now.

e.p: Someone says a bag was left unattended. What will you do?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm ngay (1 câu); nói lý do (1 câu); đề nghị một việc an toàn khác (1 câu, should/need).
e.h: Use will/going to and should; short reasons.
e.s: I will tell the security staff about the bag. I will do this because unattended bags can be dangerous. You should keep a safe distance and wait for help.

e.p: The security asks why your luggage is heavy. How do you explain?
e.m: Nói bạn đã đóng gói gì chính trong vali (1 câu Past Simple); giải thích vì sao nặng (1 câu); nói bạn đã kiểm tra trọng lượng trước khi đến sân bay (1 câu, Past Simple).
e.h: Past Simple + because; compound sentence possible.
e.s: I packed my camera and some shoes in the suitcase. It was heavy because I had many clothes and a guidebook. I checked the weight at home before I left.

e.p: A staff warns about leaving valuables in checked bags. What advice do you give a friend?
e.m: Nói rõ lời khuyên chính (must/should/have to); nêu một ví dụ đồ cần mang theo người (1 câu); giải thích lợi ích của lời khuyên (1 câu).
e.h: Use should/must/have to; give one example and one reason.
e.s: You should keep valuables in your carry-on. For example, keep your passport and phone with you. This way you will not lose important things if luggage is delayed.

d.t: Ở khách sạn: An toàn đồ dùng

e.p: Where did you put your room key?
e.m: Nói vị trí bạn để chìa/khóa (1 câu); nói bạn đã khóa cửa chưa (1 câu Past Simple); nói vì sao bạn chọn chỗ đó (1 câu).
e.h: Past Simple + because; vị trí dùng 'in/on' đơn giản.
e.s: I put the room key on the shelf near the door. I locked the door when I went out. I chose that spot because it is easy to find.

e.p: The receptionist asks if you want a safe in the room.
e.m: Nói bạn có nhận lời không (1 câu, will/going to); nêu đồ bạn sẽ bỏ vào két (1 câu); nói vì sao bạn làm vậy (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/going to and because.
e.s: I will use the safe in the room. I will put my passport and extra cash inside. I do this because it is more secure than leaving them out.

e.p: A friend says the hotel is noisy at night. What do you suggest?
e.m: Đưa hai lời khuyên (mỗi lời 1 câu, should/must); nói bạn sẽ làm gì nếu vẫn ồn (1 câu, will).
e.h: Use should/must and will; short commands OK.
e.s: You should ask the front desk for a quieter room. You must close the windows and use earplugs at night. If it stays noisy, I will ask to change rooms.

e.p: You found a broken lock on your room door. How do you report it?
e.m: Nói bạn đã làm gì ngay (1 câu, Past Simple); mô tả vấn đề ngắn (1 câu); nói bạn yêu cầu gì từ lễ tân (1 câu, will/going to).
e.h: Past Simple + will/going to + V; use because if needed.
e.s: I told the front desk about the broken lock this morning. The lock was loose and did not close properly. I asked them to fix it or give another room.

e.p: A staff warns about fake staff asking for keys. What should guests know?
e.m: Nêu một quy tắc an toàn (1 câu, must/should); cho ví dụ hành động đúng nếu ai đó yêu cầu chìa (1 câu); giải thích lợi ích (1 câu, comparative: safer than...).
e.h: Use should/must and comparative (safer/more safe).
e.s: Guests must never give keys to someone who is not an official staff. If someone asks for your key, call the front desk before you do anything. This is safer than helping a stranger immediately.

d.t: Trên tàu/xe buýt: Giữ đồ cá nhân

e.p: Do you keep your bag on your lap or above?
e.m: Nói vị trí bạn thường để túi (1 câu); nói bạn đã làm vậy lần trước không (1 câu Past Simple); nói lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Present Simple và Past Simple; use because.
e.s: I usually keep my bag on my lap on the bus. Last week I put it in the overhead rack. I do this because I can watch it more on my lap.

e.p: A pickpocket warning appears on the screen. How do you act?
e.m: Mô tả hành động bạn sẽ làm ngay (1 câu, will); nói một vật bạn sẽ kiểm tra (1 câu); nói cách giữ an toàn hơn (1 câu, should).
e.h: Use will and should; short verbs like check/look.
e.s: I will keep the bag close to my body. I will check that the zipper is closed. You should use a small bag with a zip under your coat.

e.p: Your seatmate asks to watch your laptop for a moment. What do you say?
e.m: Nói phản hồi của bạn (1 câu, will/going to or refusal with must not); giải thích lý do an toàn (1 câu); đề xuất giải pháp khác (1 câu).
e.h: Use should/must or polite refusal; give alternative.
e.s: I will not leave my laptop with a stranger. It is risky because public places are busy. I can lock it in the overhead compartment or keep it on my lap.

e.p: The bus stops and many people move. How do you secure your bag quickly?
e.m: Mô tả hai bước bạn làm (mỗi bước 1 câu); kết luận ngắn vì sao phải làm vậy (1 câu).
e.h: Use Past or Present Simple; connectors like then/because.
e.s: First I put the bag under my feet and hold the strap. Then I move it closer to my body when many people stand. I do this because it is harder for thieves to take it.

e.p: You compare two seats: by the window and near the door. Which is safer and why?
e.m: Chọn chỗ an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do ngắn (mỗi lý do 1 câu); kết luận khuyên một hành động (1 câu, should/will).
e.h: Use comparative (safer/more secure) and should/will.
e.s: The seat by the window is safer than the seat near the door. It has less movement and fewer people passing by. It is more comfortable and you can watch your bags. You should choose the window seat when you travel.

d.t: Trên bãi biển: An toàn khi bơi và giữ đồ

e.p: Did you swim alone today?
e.m: Nói có hay không (1 câu Past Simple); nếu không, nói bạn đi với ai (1 câu); nói thời điểm bạn bơi (1 câu).
e.h: Past Simple; name people with 'with'.
e.s: I didn't swim alone today. I went with a friend from the hotel. We swam in the afternoon.

e.p: A lifeguard warns about strong currents. What will you do?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm (1 câu, will); nói nơi an toàn bạn chọn (1 câu); nêu lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/going to and because.
e.s: I will stay near the shore and not swim far. I will choose the area near the lifeguard tower. I do this because the current is dangerous.

e.p: Your towel and phone are on the sand. How do you protect them?
e.m: Mô tả hai việc bạn làm để bảo vệ đồ (mỗi việc 1 câu); kết luận ngắn về lợi ích (1 câu).
e.h: Use present simple or will; short verbs like cover/put/check.
e.s: I put my towel and phone inside a small dry bag. I keep the bag under my umbrella and in sight. This keeps them dry and safe from thieves.

e.p: A friend wants to swim after sunset. What do you advise?
e.m: Nói lời khuyên chính (1 câu, must/should); giải thích nguy cơ (1 câu); đề xuất hành động an toàn thay thế (1 câu).
e.h: Use should/must and because; suggest safe option.
e.s: You should not swim after sunset because visibility is low and help is slower. The water can be colder and currents change. Go for a walk on the beach instead or swim earlier in the day.

e.p: Compare wearing a life jacket and not wearing one for a weak swimmer.
e.m: Nói cái nào an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lợi ích của phao (mỗi lợi ích 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative (safer) and 'because'; simple benefits.
e.s: Wearing a life jacket is much safer than not wearing one for a weak swimmer. It helps you float easily and saves energy. It also makes you more visible in the water.

d.t: Leo núi/đi bộ đường dài: Chuẩn bị và phòng nguy hiểm

e.p: Did you check the weather before the hike?
e.m: Nói đã kiểm tra hay chưa (1 câu Past Simple); nếu đã, nói thời tiết như thế nào (1 câu); nói bạn mang theo gì vì thời tiết đó (1 câu).
e.h: Past Simple; use weather words (sunny, windy, rainy).
e.s: I checked the weather before the hike. The forecast said it would be cloudy and windy. I brought a light rain jacket and warm layers.

e.p: You see a slippery path. How do you walk safely?
e.m: Mô tả hai hành động bạn làm khi đi trên đường trơn (mỗi hành động 1 câu); kết luận ngắn về lợi ích (1 câu).
e.h: Use should/need to and present simple; short verbs.
e.s: I walk slowly and hold onto trees or rocks for balance. I put my feet carefully and watch each step. This reduces the chance of slipping and getting hurt.

e.p: Someone gets a small cut on the trail. What do you do?
e.m: Nói việc bạn đã làm đầu tiên (1 câu Past Simple); mô tả băng hoặc chăm sóc ngắn (1 câu); nói nếu cần đi bệnh viện hay không (1 câu, will/might).
e.h: Past Simple; use will/might for next action.
e.s: I cleaned the cut with water and applied a bandage. I used the small first-aid kit to stop the bleeding. If it gets worse, we will go to the nearest clinic.

e.p: You're closer to the mountain peak but it's getting dark. What will you do?
e.m: Nói quyết định bạn sẽ làm (1 câu, will/going to); nêu lý do an toàn (1 câu); mô tả một việc chuẩn bị bạn sẽ làm (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/going to and because; short preparation verbs.
e.s: We will go down the trail now instead of reaching the peak. It is safer because visibility is low at night. We will use headlamps and follow the marked path.

e.p: Compare hiking with a group and hiking alone for safety.
e.m: Nói cách nào an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do ngắn (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative (safer) and because; provide two reasons.
e.s: Hiking with a group is much safer than hiking alone. There are more people to help if someone is hurt and more eyes to watch the path. Groups also share supplies and skills in an emergency.

d.t: Tham quan thành phố: Tránh bị lừa và an toàn ban ngày

e.p: Where did you keep your map while walking in the market?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn để bản đồ (1 câu); nói bạn có mở bản đồ nhiều lần không (1 câu Past Simple); nêu lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Past Simple and Present Simple; use 'in/inside/under'.
e.s: I kept my map inside my bag while I walked. I opened it a few times to check directions. I did this because I did not want to show the map to many people.

e.p: A vendor says the price is fixed but you think it's too high. What do you do?
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ nói gì (1 câu, will/going to or polite refusal); đưa ra hành động thay thế (1 câu); nêu lý do chọn hành động đó (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/going to and because; simple polite phrases.
e.s: I will say thank you and walk away if the price is too high. I can check other stalls for a better price. This saves time and avoids an argument.

e.p: You notice a small crowd and someone is distracted. How do you react?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm ngay (1 câu); nêu biện pháp bảo vệ đồ cá nhân (1 câu); nói vì sao (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/should and because; short verbs like watch/check.
e.s: I will move my bag to the front and watch my things. I will keep my wallet in an inside pocket. Crowds make it easier for thieves to work.

e.p: A tour guide tells you a safer route and a faster route. How do you choose?
e.m: Chọn một trong hai (1 câu, comparative like safer/faster); nêu hai lý do cho lựa chọn (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative (safer/more comfortable) and because.
e.s: I choose the safer route even if it is slower. It is less crowded and has better lighting. I prefer comfort and safety when I am not sure of the area.

e.p: Compare city walking with a map and using a phone map for safety.
e.m: Nêu cái nào an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai ưu điểm của lựa chọn đó (mỗi ưu điểm 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and present simple; give two short benefits.
e.s: Using a phone map is safer than a paper map in busy streets. It gives live directions and you can hide it quickly. It also shows your exact location so you don't get lost.

d.t: Đi về đêm: An toàn khi đi lại buổi tối

e.p: Do you usually take a taxi at night?
e.m: Nói bạn có hay đi taxi ban đêm không (1 câu); nếu có, nói bạn gọi taxi như thế nào (1 câu); nói lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Present Simple; use 'call' or 'book' for taxi.
e.s: I usually take a taxi at night. I book a taxi with a trusted app. I do this because public transport is less frequent and I feel safer.

e.p: A friend asks you to walk together after dinner. What do you reply?
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ đi cùng hay không (1 câu, will); nêu một điều bạn sẽ làm để an toàn (1 câu); giải thích vì sao (1 câu).
e.h: Use will and because; short safety action.
e.s: I will walk with you after dinner. I will stay on well-lit streets and keep my phone charged. Walking together is safer than walking alone.

e.p: You see a dark alley that is shorter. Do you take it?
e.m: Nói quyết định của bạn (1 câu, refusal or acceptance with reason); nêu một lựa chọn an toàn khác (1 câu); nói lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Use should/shouldn't and because; suggest alternative.
e.s: I won't take the dark alley because it is risky at night. I will choose the main street even if it is longer. The main street has more people and lights.

e.p: Your phone battery is low and you are alone at night. What will you do?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm ngay (1 câu, will); nêu hai bước chuẩn bị an toàn (mỗi bước 1 câu).
e.h: Use will and short imperatives or 'I will'.
e.s: I will find a well-lit place and call someone. I will conserve battery by closing apps and lowering brightness. I will also share my location with a friend.

e.p: Compare walking home with a friend and taking public transport late; which is safer?
e.m: Chọn phương án an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do ngắn cho lựa chọn (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two reasons.
e.s: Walking home with a friend is safer than taking late public transport. Friends can help if something happens and you watch each other. Public transport at night can be empty and less safe.

d.t: Tiền và giấy tờ: Giữ tiền, thẻ, hộ chiếu

e.p: Do you carry cash or card when you travel?
e.m: Nói bạn mang tiền mặt hay thẻ (1 câu); nếu cả hai, nói bạn phân chia thế nào (1 câu); nói lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Present Simple; use 'both' and 'keep' for split.
e.s: I carry both cash and a card when I travel. I keep some cash in my wallet and the card in a separate pouch. I do this so I always have money if one thing is lost.

e.p: You lost your wallet. What did you do first?
e.m: Nói việc bạn làm ngay (1 câu, Past Simple); nói bạn đã liên hệ ai (1 câu, Past Simple); nêu bước tiếp theo bạn sẽ làm (1 câu, will/might).
e.h: Past Simple then will/might; use call/report.
e.s: I reported the lost wallet to the hotel desk immediately. I called my bank to block the card. I will go to the police station to make a report if needed.

e.p: A shop only accepts card and you have few cards left. What should you do?
e.m: Nêu hai lựa chọn an toàn (mỗi lựa chọn 1 câu); nói lựa chọn bạn sẽ chọn và lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Use should/will and because; short options.
e.s: You should ask to pay by card or find an ATM nearby. You can also ask a friend to help with cash. I will look for an ATM because I need cash for small purchases.

e.p: Compare keeping passport in a hotel safe and carrying it all day.
e.m: Chọn nơi an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do hỗ trợ (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two reasons.
e.s: Keeping your passport in a hotel safe is safer than carrying it all day. The safe prevents loss or theft and you do not need it for daily activities. You can carry a photocopy instead for ID when outside.

e.p: Bank calls to confirm a big transaction. What do you say?
e.m: Nói bạn có xác nhận giao dịch không (1 câu, Past Simple or will); nếu không, nói bạn đã làm gì tiếp theo (1 câu); giải thích vì sao (1 câu).
e.h: Use Past Simple and must/check; short security words.
e.s: I confirmed I did not make the transaction. I blocked the card and asked the bank to check recent payments. This is important to stop fraud quickly.

d.t: Hành lý và đóng gói: Những thứ cần mang để an toàn

e.p: What did you pack in your carry-on?
e.m: Liệt kê ba món đồ quan trọng bạn để trong hành lý xách tay (3 ý, mỗi ý 1 câu).
e.h: Use Past Simple or Present Simple; short nouns.
e.s: I packed my passport in my carry-on. I packed a small first-aid kit. I packed a portable charger for my phone.

e.p: A friend asks if they need a lock for their suitcase.
e.m: Cho lời khuyên ngắn (1 câu, should/must); nêu một loại khóa bạn đề xuất (1 câu); nói lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Use should/must and because; name a simple lock.
e.s: You should use a small TSA-approved lock for your suitcase. A combination lock is easy and safe. It helps protect your things during travel.

e.p: Your luggage is over the weight limit. What will you remove?
e.m: Nêu hai món bạn sẽ bỏ ra (mỗi món 1 câu); nói nơi bạn sẽ để chúng tạm thời (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/going to and simple nouns; order matters.
e.s: I will remove one pair of shoes and my heavy guidebook. I will also take out extra clothes I don't need. I will put them in my carry-on or a small bag.

e.p: Compare rolling clothes and folding clothes for saving space and safety.
e.m: Nêu phương án tiết kiệm hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lợi ích (mỗi lợi ích 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative (more compact) and because; short benefits.
e.s: Rolling clothes is more compact than folding them. It saves room and reduces wrinkles. It also makes it easier to see items and pack carefully.

e.p: You pack medicine for a trip. How do you prepare them safely?
e.m: Nêu ba bước bạn làm để bảo quản thuốc (mỗi bước 1 câu).
e.h: Use present simple or will; verbs like keep/store/label.
e.s: I keep my medicine in its original boxes and label them. I store them in my carry-on to have them with me. I also bring a copy of prescriptions in case I need more.

d.t: Sức khỏe khi du lịch: ốm đau, thuốc, bảo hiểm

e.p: Did you buy travel insurance for this trip?
e.m: Nói đã mua hay chưa (1 câu Past Simple); nếu có, nói điều chính bảo hiểm che (1 câu); nói bạn đã mang theo giấy tờ bảo hiểm ở đâu (1 câu).
e.h: Past Simple and Present Simple; use 'cover' for insurance.
e.s: I bought travel insurance before the trip. The insurance covers medical bills and lost luggage. I keep the policy paper in my carry-on.

e.p: You have a mild fever during travel. What should you do?
e.m: Nêu hai bước trước mắt (mỗi bước 1 câu); nói nếu bạn sẽ đi khám bác sĩ hay không (1 câu, will/might).
e.h: Use should/need to and will/might; simple health verbs.
e.s: You should rest and drink plenty of fluids. You should take a simple fever medicine if needed. If the fever continues, I will visit a clinic.

e.p: A pharmacy asks what medicine you need. How do you explain symptoms?
e.m: Mô tả triệu chứng chính (1 câu); nói đã dùng thuốc gì trước đó (1 câu, Past Simple); hỏi mua thuốc phù hợp (1 câu).
e.h: Use Past Simple and present simple; short symptom words (fever, cough).
e.s: I have a sore throat and a mild fever. I took paracetamol this morning but it did not help much. Can you give something for the throat and fever?

e.p: Compare seeing a local clinic and going to a big hospital when sick abroad.
e.m: Nói nơi nào an toàn hơn cho vấn đề nhỏ (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two reasons simple.
e.s: A local clinic is usually faster and better for small health problems than a big hospital. Clinics often have shorter wait times and lower costs. They can give medicine quickly for simple issues.

e.p: You need your regular prescription while abroad. What will you do?
e.m: Nói bạn đã chuẩn bị gì trước chuyến đi (1 câu); nêu việc bạn sẽ làm nếu không tìm được thuốc (1 câu, will/might); nói cách liên hệ với bác sĩ nếu cần (1 câu).
e.h: Use Past Simple and will/might; mention prescription copy.
e.s: I brought a copy of my prescription and some extra medicine. If I cannot find the same drug, I will ask the pharmacist for an equivalent. I will contact my doctor by phone if I need advice.

d.t: Trường hợp khẩn cấp: Bị mất đồ hoặc sự cố

e.p: Did you report the stolen phone to the police?
e.m: Nói đã báo cảnh sát chưa (1 câu Past Simple); nếu báo rồi, nói nơi và thời gian (1 câu); nêu kết quả ngắn (1 câu).
e.h: Past Simple and short place/time words.
e.s: I reported the stolen phone to the police yesterday. I went to the local station near the market. They took my statement and gave a report number.

e.p: A friend sprains an ankle. What do you do first?
e.m: Mô tả hai hành động sơ cứu bạn làm (mỗi hành động 1 câu); nói bạn sẽ làm gì tiếp theo (1 câu, will/might).
e.h: Use Past Simple or will; verbs like rest, ice, elevate.
e.s: I helped them sit down and rest the ankle. I wrapped it with a bandage and elevated the foot. We will go to a clinic if the pain does not get better.

e.p: You found a lost child at the train station. How do you act?
e.m: Nói bước đầu bạn sẽ làm (1 câu); nêu ai bạn sẽ gọi hoặc tìm (1 câu); giải thích vì sao hành động đó an toàn (1 câu).
e.h: Use will and because; short authority words like staff/security.
e.s: I will stay with the child and ask station staff for help. I will call the station security and use the lost-and-found desk. This is safe because staff know procedures and can find the parents.

e.p: Compare reporting a theft immediately and waiting until you return home.
e.m: Nói cách nào tốt hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two short reasons.
e.s: Reporting a theft immediately is better than waiting until you return home. Immediate reports help police act quickly and increase chances to recover items. It also helps your insurance claim.

e.p: An emergency alert asks you to evacuate. What will you do and tell others?
e.m: Nói việc bạn sẽ làm ngay (1 câu, will); nói cách bạn sẽ thông báo cho bạn bè hoặc gia đình (1 câu); nêu một điều bạn sẽ mang theo khi rời đi (1 câu).
e.h: Use will and short verbs like call/text; include one item to take.
e.s: I will leave the area calmly and follow the official route. I will call or text my friends to tell them to go to a safe place. I will take my passport and phone before I go.

d.t: Du lịch cùng trẻ em hoặc người già: Biện pháp an toàn

e.p: Did you bring a child's ID and emergency contact?
e.m: Nói đã chuẩn bị ID và số liên lạc chưa (1 câu Past Simple); nếu có, nói bạn giữ ở đâu (1 câu); nêu lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Past Simple and present location words.
e.s: I brought the child's ID and emergency contact details. I keep them in my wallet and a copy in the child's bag. I did this because it is important if we get separated.

e.p: A child in your group is tired and wants to stop. What will you do?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm ngay (1 câu); mô tả việc bạn chuẩn bị để tiếp tục an toàn sau đó (1 câu); giải thích vì sao cần nghỉ (1 câu).
e.h: Use will and because; short childcare verbs.
e.s: I will stop and rest with the child for a while. I will give water and a snack and check shoes are comfortable. Rest helps avoid accidents and keeps the child calm.

e.p: An elderly traveler has trouble walking. How do you assist them?
e.m: Nêu hai hỗ trợ bạn làm (mỗi việc 1 câu); nói nếu bạn sẽ yêu cầu hỗ trợ chuyên nghiệp hay không (1 câu, will/might).
e.h: Use should/will; simple verbs like help/assist.
e.s: I help them by carrying light bags and walking at their pace. I also offer my arm and choose a route with fewer stairs. If needed, I will ask staff for a wheelchair or extra help.

e.p: Compare using a stroller and a baby carrier in a crowded place.
e.m: Chọn cách an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do ngắn (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two reasons.
e.s: A baby carrier is safer than a stroller in a very crowded place. It keeps the child close and reduces the chance of bumping or losing the stroller. It also makes moving through crowds faster and easier.

e.p: You're responsible for a small group's safety for a day. What rules do you set?
e.m: Nêu ba quy tắc ngắn bạn đặt ra (mỗi quy tắc 1 câu).
e.h: Use should/must and short commands; three clear rules.
e.s: Everyone must stay together and not wander off alone. You should always carry ID and an emergency contact card. Children must hold an adult's hand in crowded areas.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tình huống tại sân bay và khách sạn

e.p: Your flight was delayed and you are tired. What will you do at the airport?
e.m: Nói hai việc bạn sẽ làm ngay (mỗi việc 1 câu); nêu lý do nghỉ ngơi là tốt cho an toàn (1 câu).
e.h: Use will and because; short restful verbs.
e.s: I will find a quiet spot and sit down to rest. I will charge my phone and drink water to stay alert. Rest is important because tired people make more mistakes and lose things.

e.p: You checked into a hotel and the room smells strange. What do you tell reception?
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ thông báo gì (1 câu, Past Simple or will); mô tả vấn đề ngắn (1 câu); nêu yêu cầu bạn muốn (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/ Past Simple and request 'change room' or 'fix'.
e.s: I told the reception that the room had a strange smell when I arrived. The smell was like damp and old sheets. I asked them to change the room or clean it properly.

e.p: Compare keeping valuables in a hotel safe and carrying them when checking a bag.
e.m: Chọn cách an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do hỗ trợ (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two reasons.
e.s: Keeping valuables in a hotel safe is safer than carrying them when you check a bag. The safe reduces the chance of theft and loss. It also means you don't need to carry extra weight during travel.

e.p: You woke up to find someone tried your room door. What do you do?
e.m: Nói bạn đã làm ngay (1 câu, Past Simple); mô tả bạn báo ai (1 câu); nêu một việc bạn sẽ làm tiếp để an toàn (1 câu, will).
e.h: Past Simple + will; use report/lock/change room.
e.s: I called the front desk as soon as I noticed the door damage. I told them someone tried to open the door last night. I will ask for a different room and extra security.

e.p: A travel alert says to keep valuables on you. How do you plan for the next day?
e.m: Nói ba bước bạn sẽ chuẩn bị (mỗi bước 1 câu).
e.h: Use will/shall and should; simple verbs like pack/check.
e.s: I will pack my valuables in my carry-on and keep them near me. I will use a money belt for extra security. I will avoid carrying large amounts of cash.

d.t: Ôn tập: Di chuyển và bảo vệ đồ cá nhân

e.p: On a crowded train you feel someone near your pocket. What do you do?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn làm ngay (1 câu); nêu cách bạn kiểm tra đồ (1 câu); nói hành động sẽ làm nếu mất đồ (1 câu, will).
e.h: Use present simple for action + will for next step.
e.s: I move my hand to cover the pocket and watch the person. I check my wallet quickly to make sure it is there. If something is missing, I will report it at the next station.

e.p: You need to leave luggage at a station locker. How do you ensure safety?
e.m: Nêu hai bước bạn làm trước khi bỏ đồ (mỗi bước 1 câu); nêu lý do (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/should and because; short verbs like lock/check.
e.s: I check that the locker is official and working before I use it. I put only non-valuable items and lock it with a code or my lock. This reduces the risk of theft and gives peace of mind.

e.p: Compare carrying a crossbody bag and a backpack in a busy market.
e.m: Chọn cái an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do ngắn (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two reasons.
e.s: A crossbody bag is safer than a backpack in a busy market. It stays in front so you can see it and it is harder for thieves to reach. It is also more comfortable to keep small items safe.

e.p: Your phone falls on the floor in a cafe. What did you do?
e.m: Mô tả hành động bạn đã làm (1 câu, Past Simple); nói nếu ai trả lại hay không (1 câu); nêu hành động phòng ngừa bạn sẽ làm sau đó (1 câu, will).
e.h: Past Simple and will; simple past verbs.
e.s: I picked up the phone immediately and checked the screen. A kind person picked it up and handed it back to me. I will use a protective case and keep it in a secure pocket.

e.p: A fellow traveler suggests sharing location during a trip. What do you answer?
e.m: Nói bạn có đồng ý không (1 câu); nêu hai lợi ích của việc chia sẻ vị trí (mỗi lợi ích 1 câu).
e.h: Use will/shall and because; two benefits.
e.s: I agree to share my location with the group. It helps everyone know where we are and meet quickly. It is also useful in case of an emergency.

d.t: Ôn tập: Khẩn cấp và sức khỏe khi du lịch

e.p: You woke up with food poisoning while traveling. What did you do first?
e.m: Nói việc bạn làm đầu tiên (1 câu, Past Simple); nêu thuốc hoặc biện pháp bạn dùng (1 câu); nói nếu bạn đi khám bác sĩ hay không (1 câu, will/might).
e.h: Past Simple + will/might; simple health verbs.
e.s: I rested in bed and drank water to avoid dehydration. I took some rehydration salts and light medicine for the stomach. If it got worse, I would go to a clinic for help.

e.p: A hotel offers to call an ambulance. What will you say?
e.m: Cho phản hồi của bạn (1 câu, will/going to); nêu thông tin bạn sẽ cung cấp cho nhân viên (1 câu); nói ai bạn sẽ gọi (1 câu).
e.h: Use will/going to and give short info words (name, condition).
e.s: Yes, I will ask you to call an ambulance, please. I will give my name and the traveler's symptoms. I will also call the emergency contact listed in the reservation.

e.p: Compare buying medicine abroad and bringing your own from home.
e.m: Nêu cách an toàn hơn (1 câu, comparative); nêu hai lý do ngắn (mỗi lý do 1 câu).
e.h: Use comparative and because; two reasons simple.
e.s: Bringing your own medicine is safer than buying abroad for regular prescriptions. You know the exact dose and brand you need. Local medicines might be different and require a doctor's advice.

e.p: You need to explain symptoms to a doctor who speaks little English. How do you describe them?
e.m: Nêu ba triệu chứng chính bạn sẽ nói (mỗi triệu chứng 1 câu).
e.h: Use short simple sentences and common words (pain, fever, cough).
e.s: I have a high fever and I feel very hot. I have a bad stomach and I am vomiting. I also feel weak and I have a headache.

e.p: After an emergency, you make a short report for your travel insurance. What do you write?
e.m: Nêu ba thông tin chính bạn sẽ ghi (mỗi thông tin 1 câu): sự việc, thời gian/địa điểm, hành động bạn đã làm.
e.h: Use Past Simple and short factual sentences.
e.s: The incident was a minor ankle sprain during a hike on April 3 at Blue Trail. It happened in the afternoon near the summit. I received first aid, went to a clinic, and kept all medical receipts.
